description_long: This is a wooden easel with a slanted rectangular board supported by a rear leg, designed for upright display or interactive use. The front surface features multiple colored elastic bands (blue and pink) stretched between pegs, forming various geometric shapes, likely for educational or creative activities. The wood grain is visible, giving it a natural and sturdy appearance, and the edges are rounded for safety and aesthetics. The rear support leg is attached with visible hinges, allowing the easel to fold flat or stand at an angle. There are no trays or ledges for holding art supplies, but the pegs and bands provide a tactile, interactive surface. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and portable, suitable for use in parks, sidewalks, or community spaces.
description: A wooden easel with a slanted board, supported by a rear leg, featuring colorful elastic bands stretched between pegs for interactive or educational use. The natural wood finish and geometric band patterns make it visually engaging and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full board with blue and pink elastic bands forming geometric shapes on the wooden surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled stance of the easel and the arrangement of elastic bands and pegs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the supporting leg and the plain wooden back of the easel, with no visible bands or pegs.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the support structure and a partial glimpse of the colored bands on the front.
